name: tichu_v7_card_layer
requirements: Card locations are dynamic layers, exactly like passing lanes.
Use h/a.json as the card layout source of truth.
Do not use generic flex/row/column hand layout inside the table.
All hand/deck/discard cards must be positioned by anchors from h/a.json through the 1536x1024 contain-fit transform.
The table image is not gameplay state. It is a static plate plus card anchor coordinates.
If table/prototype art shows baked cards, dynamic cards must cover the prototype footprints using h/a.json anchors.

south_hand.note: Large foreground hand. Use exact anchor list; do not flex-row outside this zone.

north_hand.note: Top rack/back prototype. Opponent cards should be backs unless demo face-up mode.

west_hand.note: Left rail rack prototype. No generic margin column.

east_hand.note: Right rail rack prototype. No generic margin column.
